text:
ach minute has sixty
seconds. The Sun apparently covers the 360 degrees within
twenty four hours. He traverses one degree in four minutes.
One tenth of a degree takes twenty four seconds. This is the
time measure accepted by the Nadi texts.
As per the Vimshottari dasa system, we divide the constel
lations into three groups, each group ruled by one planet. For
easy reference we give these in a tabular form thus:
Nakshatras Ruler Years
Asvini, Magha, Mula Ketu 7
Bharani, Purva Phalguni, Shukra 20
Purvashadha
Krittika, Uttara Phalguni, Ravi 6
Uttarashadha
Rohini, Hasta, Sravana Chandra 10

Nadi Rectification 71
Nakshatras Ruler Years
Mrigasira, Chitra, Dhanishtha Kuja 7
Ardra, Svati, Satabhisa Rahu 18
Punarvasu, Visakha, Purva Guru 16
Bhadra
Pushyami, Anuradha, Uttara Shani 19
Bhadra
Aslesha, Jyeshtha, Revati Budha 17
The same group recurs after every twenty seven minutes.
Each group of three constellations is divided into movable
(cardinal), fixed, and common signs.
